name: Pumpkin Gingerbread Loaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease four 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pans, greasing only halfway up the sides.
2. Stir together 1 cup of flour, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and baking soda in a large bowl.
3. Add pumpkin, molasses, eggs, margarine or butter, and ginger to the dry ingredients. Beat until combined (about 30 seconds).
4. Increase mixer speed to medium to high and beat for 2 minutes, scraping sides of the bowl occasionally.
5. Stir in remaining flour until just mixed.
6. Divide batter evenly among prepared pans.
7. Sprinkle topping mixture (walnuts and sugar) over each loaf.
8. Bake for 40-50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted near the center comes out clean.
9. Cool loaves in pans on wire racks for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool thoroughly on wire racks.
10. Freeze: Wrap tightly in moisture- and vaporproof wrap, seal, label, and freeze up to 6 months. Thaw at room temperature for 1 hour or microwave uncovered at 30% power (medium-low) for 1-1/2 minutes.
Makes 4 loaves, 8 servings each.
